question: Show all female bank account holders in Jaipur district.
expected_sql: SELECT member.member_name, family.jan_aadhaar_number, bank_details.bank_name FROM member JOIN family ON member.family_id = family.family_id JOIN bank_details ON bank_details.member_id = member.member_id WHERE member.gender = 'Female' AND family.district = 'Jaipur';

question: How many SC category citizens live in Kotputli block?
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(member.member_id) AS citizen_count FROM member JOIN family ON member.family_id = family.family_id WHERE member.caste_category = 'SC' AND family.block = 'Kotputli';

question: Show top 10 villages with the most families.
expected_sql: SELECT family.village, COUNT(family.family_id) AS family_count FROM family GROUP BY family.village ORDER BY family_count DESC LIMIT 10;
